threshold: Threshold for model confidence. High conf -> obj from train

shadow_data_ratio: Percentage of original dataset available for intruder
shadow_epochs: Number of train epochs for shadow model

shadow_edge_ratio: Percentage of original edges available for intruder
shadow_train_ratio: Percentage of shadow edges used for shadow model training (vs testing)
shadow_epochs: Number of train epochs for shadow model
classifier_type: Type of classifier for MI attack
use_embedding_features: Whether to include node embeddings in attack features (improves accuracy)
